feat.name: Final Shot
feat.text: You jam a triple charge of black powder into your weapon to unleash a devastating but risky and inaccurate attack. Interact to reload, expending three doses of black powder in addition to your normal black powder or ammunition, then Strike with your firearm against a creature within the weapon's first range increment. If you roll a success, the attack is instead a critical success, but if you roll a failure, the weapon misfires. Regardless of your roll, after the attack you're flat-footed until the start of your next turn and stunned 1.

traits.name: Gunslinger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the gunslinger class.
